历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for science/physics category approximately 604→488→518→174→416; fluctuated between 488–604 from 2021–2023, abnormal shift to 174 in 2024 due to sudden plan reduction to 2 (incomparable), recovered to 416 in 2025; recent 3 years (excluding 2024 anomaly) rankings between 416–518, 2025 baseline approximately 416; provincial science/physics plan: 2021: 11, 2022: 50, 2023: 48, 2024: 2 (anomaly), 2025: 47; 2026 plan: 73, an increase of 26 from 2025, a significant expansion of about 55.3%, notably easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking main list 5th (Top5), top national university tier; 2026 Gaokao cycle reputation evaluation slightly negative (14 events, 5 negative), mainly related to teacher ethics and school management; 2025 reputation slightly positive (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline); Douyin heat total ranking 4th (high heat), comprehensive heat about 10.74 million, showing extremely high attention; historical enrollment anomalies: 2022 Henan saw a sharp drop signal (medium attention), but no sustained gaps in recent years; fifth round discipline evaluation A- and above total 27 disciplines, physics-related representative disciplines include: Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A, Biology A+, Clinical Medicine A, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Biomedical Engineering A-, Statistics A, etc., highly matching physics category enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class directions, Mathematics Class, Physics Class, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Biological Sciences Class, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science social heat recommended (2024, slight cooling but still hot), electronic information/communication high heat recommended, electrical engineering and automation high heat recommended, mathematics/statistics recommended; Henan Province 2026 general Gaokao total candidates about 1.2 million (uncertain mark), estimated by 2025 physics category proportion about 61.2%, 2026 physics category candidates about 734,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (555,000), intensifying competition, 2025 physics category undergraduate batch 427 points, special type 535 points; Fudan University located in Shanghai, no local enrollment preference in Henan; Henan candidate scale largest in China, cross-province application to Shanghai universities regional preference persists, Fudan as one of East China Five universities has stable appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining 2025 baseline ranking 416, 2026 significant expansion of 55.3% (competition notably eased, ranking forward direction), Henan physics category candidate number significantly increased by about 32% (competition intensified, ranking backward direction), reputation slightly negative but Douyin high heat, top school tier supports ranking, expansion effect greater than candidate increase effect, expected ranking moderately forward from 2025 baseline; predicted minimum ranking about 524, range 464–584.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category: approximately 108 → 110 → 108 → 121 → 133. Stable in the 108–110 range from 2021 to 2023, shifted to 121 in 2024, further shifted to 133 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 25 positions over the past 3 years, showing a slow backward trend; 2025 baseline ranking approximately 133; provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan: 10 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 18 in 2024, 18 in 2025; 2026 plan 19, an increase of 1 from 2025, a small expansion of about 5.6%, with limited impact on competition landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking main list 5th (Top 5), stable in the 5th–6th range in recent years, belonging to the top national university level; 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents (14 incidents, 5 negative), but 2025 reputation is somewhat positive (scientific research achievements A++ disciplines); Douyin heat total ranking 4th (high heat), comprehensive heat approximately 10.74 million, showing extremely high attention; historical enrollment anomalies: in 2022, Henan saw a signal of a sharp drop in admission cutoff (medium attention), also mentioned in 2023, but no sustained gaps; fifth round discipline evaluation A- and above total 27 disciplines, representative disciplines include: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Political Science A+, Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chinese History A+, Biology A+, Clinical Medicine A, Applied Economics A, Law A-, etc., highly matching with liberal arts enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Law, Economics, Social Science Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social heat is somewhat hot (2024, differentiation and wait-and-see), Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged (2023), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese somewhat hot (recommended); Henan Province 2026 general college entrance examination total number approximately 1.2 million (uncertain mark), estimated based on 2025 history category proportion of about 38.8%, 2026 history category examinees approximately 466,000, significantly increased from 2025 (352,000), competition intensifies, 2025 history category undergraduate batch 471 points, special type 552 points, but not directly included in calculation; Fudan University located in Shanghai (municipality), no local enrollment preference in Henan Province; Henan Province has the largest number of examinees in the country, cross-provincial application to Shanghai universities regional preference persists, Fudan as one of the East China Five has stable attraction for Henan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the slow backward trend of historical rankings (2025 baseline 133), small expansion of 1 person in 2026 (competition slightly eased), significant increase in Henan Province history category examinees (competition intensifies), somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin heat (extremely high attention), top school level (Soft Science 5th) supports rankings, multiple factors offset each other, expected ranking to slightly shift backward from 133; predicted minimum ranking approximately 140, range 90–190.
